name: Community State Bank
description_short: Shelbina-based Community State Bank at 208 N Center St, MO delivers banking services including personal accounts and loans.
description_long:
Community State Bank's Shelbina branch is located at 208 N Center St in Shelbina, MO. This full-service banking location offers in-person teller services, deposit accounts, loan consultations, and access to banking products suited for individuals and businesses. Specific hours are not currently published online—contact the branch to confirm availability before your visit.

At this Shelbina location, customers can open personal or business checking and savings accounts, apply for loans, and use wire transfer services. For specific information about available products or to discuss your financial needs with a banker, contact the Shelbina branch directly.

If you're banking in Shelbina, MO, bring a valid government-issued ID for account opening or loan applications. The location at 208 N Center St makes it convenient for residents and local business owners to handle banking needs in person.
services: Checking accounts (CSB Basic, Freedom Checking, Community Club, NOW, Super NOW accounts)
Savings accounts and Money Market Accounts with tiered interest options
pros: FDIC insured deposits with clear insurance coverage disclosures
Diverse checking account options including Community Club 55/55+ accounts targeting seniors
Multiple savings vehicles including tiered money market accounts and Christmas Club savings accounts
Debit cards (Shazam®) and credit cards (Visa®) issued directly by the bank
Online and mobile banking available with dedicated phone support for enrollment
Proactive fraud prevention messaging and customer security alerts posted on website
Full-service lending including consumer loans, commercial loans, and mortgage products
cons: Limited to single physical branch location in rural Missouri, restricting accessibility for most customers
Website provides minimal product details—no rates, fees, minimum balance requirements, or loan terms disclosed
No information about APY/APR, promotional offers, or competitive advantages versus larger regional banks
Outdated web design and navigation structure make it difficult to access specific product information
No mention of modern banking features like mobile check deposit, bill pay, person-to-person transfers, or account aggregation
best_for: Residents of Shelbina, Missouri and surrounding Shelby County communities with local banking needs
Seniors seeking community bank relationships with accounts specifically designed for 55+ customers
Small business owners and commercial customers in rural Missouri seeking relationship-based lending
diagnosis: Community State Bank is best for customers in Shelbina, Missouri and surrounding areas who value local banking relationships and personalized service. The primary caveat is that as a single-branch rural bank, it is not accessible to most consumers, and the website lacks specific rate, fee, and product detail information necessary for informed comparison shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community State Bank at 208 N Center St, Shelbina, MO. Full-service banking with personal and business accounts.
